acceptance_criteria.description: AC1: four modules shank/gallery/prongs/seat union into one solid
AC3: min wall 0.8mm enforced by construction
AC4: min prong tip 0.7mm enforced by construction
AC5: prong_count snaps to 4 + warns for non {4,6}
AC6: oversized stone renders valid + warns
AC7: reusable trimesh validator (watertight, 0 non-manifold, 1 body)
AC8: parameter-sweep test renders matrix + validates all
AC9: render time + STL size budget, pinned $fn
AC10: golden default ring renders + validates
AC11: clamp/snap warnings on stderr, asserted
